roa.docketEntryComment: Motion to Add to Calendar; CPO modification

/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/X:THE COURT GRANTS PARTIES REQUEST FOR DIVERSION//X:COURT ORDERED MISDEMEANOR DIVERSION IS A 6 MONTH DIVERSIONARY PERIOD/NUNC1:DIVERSION PERIOD /NUNCDAT:04-08-22//X:DEFENDANT SHALL SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETE THE FOLLOWING DIRECTIVES:/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO ATTEND 3 SMART RECOVERYMEETINGS A WEEK AND MAINTAIN SOBRIETY/X:NO CRIMINAL PROTECTIVE ORDER VIOLATIONS, NO NEW ARRESTS LEADING TO CHARGES, NO NEW ARRESTS WHILE INEBRIATED//CTORD:DEJ TO TERMINATE 10-10-22/WIT SWORN:MARIELA LETICIA SECK (DOB 10-03-1990)/SATERM/SAORD/SA5:MARIELA LETICIA SECK/CONTD:DEJ PROGRESS REPORT/DOPU:FAVRPT/

/CAL:POSSIBLE CPO MODIFICATION/X:DEFENDANT PRESENT BY ZOOM/SATERM/SAORD/SA1:MARIELA SECK/SA2:238 SHARADER ST, SF CA/SAORD3/CTORD:DEFENDANT MAY CONTACT LAW ENFORCEMENT FOR A CIVIL STAND BY AT 238 SHARADER ST, SF/X:ORDER TO PROVIDE POLICE ESCORT FOR CIVIL STANDBY FILED/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/SB:2HRS/

/CAL: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE AND MOTION TO MODIFY CRIMINAY PROTECTIVE ORDER/WIT SWORN: MARIELA SECK/MO GRTD/SATERM/SAORD/SA1:MARIELLA LETICIA SECK, WHITE FEMALE, DOB 10-03-90/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/SB: 2 HOURS/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE & POSSIBLE CPO MODIFICATION/WIT SWORN DA:MARIELA SECK/SATERM/SA1:MARIELA SECK/SA2:238 SHARADER ST, SF CA/CTORD:DEFENDANT MAY HAVE TELEPHONIC & ELECTRONIC CONTACT WITH PROTECTED PERSONS/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE & POSSIBLE CPO MODIFICATION/DOP/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE & STATUS OF OR CHECK INS/DAWT/X:OFFICE OF THE PUBLIC DEFFENDANT IS RELEAVED/X:ATTORNEY COLLIN MOORE MAKES GENERAL APPEARANCE/FAVRPT/CONT/SB:2HRS/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:DEFENDANT IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM/X:DEFENDANT HAS TESTED POSITIVE FOR COVID/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/GTWM/ORMS/CTORD:CIVIL STANDBY ALLOWED/SA1:MARIELA LETICIA SECK/SA2:238 SHRADER ST, SF CA/SAORD2/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE, STATUS OF ORMS CHECK INS & STATUS OF CHECK INS/DOPU: FAVORABLE REPORT/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/CTORD:PTD PROGRESS REPORTS NO LONGER REQUIRED, PTD IS RELIEVED/CONT/SB:2HRS/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/NEGRPT/CTORD:DEFENDANT'S TWICE A WEEK CHECK IN WITH ACM IS DELETED/CONT/SB:2 HRS/
